csm@fast.name: cross_sectional_momentum
csm@fast.label: csm@fast
csm@fast.notes: High-turnover preset (3-mo mom, 20d hold): 200+ trades but NO edge — CPCV -0.16, DSR 0.15, frac+ 0.40, loses in a regime (min_regime -1.17, per_regime_expectancy FAIL), forward -$38. Edge lives in the SLOWER 6-mo signal. Battery correctly rejected; does not reach paper.

shmr@default.name: short_horizon_mr
shmr@default.label: shmr@default
shmr@default.notes: RSI2 MR, full universe: REAL high-turnover edge (754 trades, PF 1.13, frac+ 0.80, positive in ALL regimes, +forward holdout, robust to LOO/ticker-conc). But NEAR-MISS FAIL: CPCV 0.455 (<0.50), DSR 0.650 (<0.70 SCREEN), regime_concentration 5.16 (>2.0 -> profit concentrated in mean-reverting regime), OOS degradation. Pre-registered default judged (did NOT cherry-pick cfg1 CPCV 0.819). Edge is regime-dependent, not all-weather.
